title: 11 Effective Herbal Tinctures for Office Workers to Ease Swollen Feet
description: Zingiber officinale tinctures, also known as ginger tincture, may help alleviate swollen feet due to its anti-inflammatory properties. The main constituents of ginger, such as gingerols and shogaols, have been shown to reduce inflammation and pain. These compounds work by inhibiting the production of prostaglandins, which are hormone-like substances that cause pain and inflammation.
